entity.summary: opBNB automated-market-maker decentralized exchange and DAO with residual protocol liquidity and exchange registry presence.
entity.notes: CoinGecko candidate data preserves CUBISwap under the cubiswap.finance domain. DefiLlama classifies CUBISwap as an opBNB AMM DEX and reports current TVL, but no recent DEX-volume surface was available in this review pass and the first-party website could not be fully verified. HEI therefore uses limited status and live_unverified URL status.

evidence.title: CUBISwap official website
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party CUBISwap domain is preserved in the exchange candidate source, but the website could not be fully verified during this review pass, so URL status remains live_unverified.

evidence.title: CUBISwap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies CUBISwap as an opBNB AMM DEX/DAO and reports current TVL, supporting residual protocol activity but not enough evidence for full active classification.

evidence.title: CUBISwap exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently identifies CUBISwap under the cubiswap.finance domain and corroborates the exchange entity identity.
